title: 분사구문
instruction: 다음 문장에서 분사구문을 찾아 [ ]로 묶고, 문맥에 맞게 자연스럽게 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: Entering the room, I saw him sleeping.

answer.analysis: [Entering the room], I saw him sleeping.
answer.translation: 방에 들어갔을 때, 나는 그가 자고 있는 것을 보았다.

problems.stem: Being very tired, I decided to take a rest.

answer.analysis: [Being very tired], I decided to take a rest.
answer.translation: 매우 피곤했기 때문에, 나는 휴식을 취하기로 결정했다.

problems.stem: Taking a walk in the park, I met an old friend.

answer.analysis: [Taking a walk in the park], I met an old friend.
answer.translation: 공원에서 산책을 하다가, 나는 옛 친구를 만났다.

problems.stem: Not having a car, she usually uses the subway.

answer.analysis: [Not having a car], she usually uses the subway.
answer.translation: 차가 없기 때문에, 그녀는 보통 지하철을 이용한다.

problems.stem: The storm hit the city, causing a lot of damage.

answer.analysis: The storm hit the city, [causing a lot of damage].
answer.translation: 폭풍이 도시를 덮쳐, 많은 피해를 야기했다.

problems.stem: Finished with his work, he went home.

answer.analysis: [Finished with his work], he went home.

problems.stem: Following the map, we found the treasure.

answer.analysis: 분사구문) [Following the map], we found the treasure.

problems.stem: He hurt his leg, playing soccer.
Seen from a distance, the rock looks like a human face.

answer.analysis: [Seen from a distance], the rock looks like a human face.
answer.translation: 멀리서 보면, 그 바위는 사람 얼굴처럼 보인

problems.stem: Having finished dinner, we watched a movie.
